claim: Phases 002, 003, and 007 can start now because the root phase graph gives 002 no dependency, 003 no dependency, and 007 no internal 027 dependency; 007's 028 link is a live-promotion evidence gate, not an implementation-start blocker.
Phase 004 is blocked on Phase 003 because the root graph and phase metadata both make 003 the predecessor for causal tombstones.
Phase 005 is blocked on Phase 004 because generated metadata edges need lifecycle cleanup before stale generated edges can be safely removed.
Phase 006 is blocked on Phases 003 and 005 because stable chunk identities/fingerprints are required as diff keys and generated causal-edge sets become later statediff inputs.
Phase 008 is hard-blocked on Phase 002 before reducer work, then internally orders aggregator before three consumers and env/tests integration last.
Phase 007 can implement default-off/shadow semantic triggers now, but live union promotion is soft-blocked on 028 shadow-eval evidence.
Phase 008 learning reducers are soft-blocked on 028 eval/telemetry for tuning, but P0 correctness is already separated into sibling Phase 002 and must not wait on 028.
The risk-minimising implementation order is 002, 003, 007-shadow in parallel, then 004, 005, 006, and finally 008 after 002 with its consumers after the aggregator.
